summary: Iteration 16 Bug Fix Testing Complete - All 11 backend tests passed, All frontend tests passed. Auto-entry settings persist across backend restarts. Market data quick endpoint responds fast (<200ms). Settings > Broker tab now uses /api/brokers/connection correctly. Separated useEffect for market polling (500ms in LIVE mode).

issues: 404 errors for favicon - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Market data polling useEffect correctly isolated - dependencies are minimal (tradingMode, upstoxConnected, loadMarketDataQuick)
Auto-entry settings now load from MongoDB at startup via settings_manager
Settings broker connection check uses /api/brokers/connection which routes to active broker
test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 bug fixes verified. Auto-entry persists across restarts. Market data polling is separated into dedicated useEffect. Settings > Broker tab uses active broker's connection status. All 9 instruments work in option chain. SIMULATED badge shows when broker not connected.

auto_entry_persistence.description: Auto-entry settings persist across backend restarts

ui_verified.market_ticker: NIFTY, SENSEX, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY values shown

settings_broker_tab.description: Settings > Broker tab shows connection status

ui_verified.broker_selection: 6 brokers shown (Upstox, Zerodha, Angel One, 5paisa, Paytm, IIFL)

market_polling_useeffect_isolation.description: Market polling useEffect is separated from other intervals

mocked_apis_note: Market data returns source=none (no Upstox token in preview). Option chain data is SIMULATED. This is expected behavior.
